title: Norgk clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Norgk_Clan_Fortress.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ruins of Norgk clan fortress]]
The '''Norgk clan''' was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] native to [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. Their obliterated fortress was located near the [[Glonnk clan]]'s fortress.<ref name="TEGtPaM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-07-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''
